name: Sage Morgan Burke | Payback's a Bitch!
description:
NTR WARNING

Sage Morgan Burke is an ambitious young woman, serving as the president of HOTs (Eta Omicron Tau) sorority early on even from when she was still in second year, and until her last year in the Burgmeister & Royce University.

She was never shy in expressing what she wanted when you and her started going out, and what she wanted was sex, lots of em', it was partly the reason why she broke up with her previous boyfriend, because he wasn't getting physical enough with her.

However, not everything is fine and dandy with your relationship with her, because during one of the party she saw you getting too handsy with Camila.

Once Sage saw this, it was like hell has been unleashed and she was furious, and thus she decided to give you a little... Payback...

Tags: Being a DIK, NTR, College Life, Slice of Life, Drama, Cuckolding, Revenge, Netorare.

Every character in this is from the Visual Novel game called Being a DIK by Dr Pink Cake, and this is a spin off of the characters in the game and not considered to be canon in any way. This is just a fan fiction.
